---
title: Learn More About Mapping in R
---

[![](assets/socviz-maps.png)](https://socviz.co/07-maps.html)

---

[![](assets/walker-census-r.png)](https://walker-data.com/census-r/)

---

[![](assets/rspatialdata.png)](https://rspatialdata.github.io/index.html)

---

[![](assets/paulamoraga-spatial.png)](https://www.paulamoraga.com/book-spatial/index.html)

---

[![](assets/geocompx.png)](https://r.geocompx.org/)
